spec.name: bias_signature_catalog
spec.description: Catalog of named bias signatures — recurring reasoning distortion patterns detectable across communications. Used by BSE to classify sender cognitive fingerprints. Dual-purpose: inward-facing (Owlume user reflection) and outward-facing (HumanTrace fraud sender detection).

signatures.label: Urgency Exploiter
signatures.description: Consistently manufactures time pressure to override careful thought. Every communication contains artificial deadlines and consequences for delay.

signatures.label: Authority Appropriator
signatures.description: Consistently impersonates trusted institutions to suppress critical evaluation. Uses official-sounding language to manufacture legitimacy.

signatures.label: Reward Fabricator
signatures.description: Consistently presents impossible financial returns to exploit desire for wealth. Removes perceived risk while manufacturing urgency around opportunity.

signatures.label: Empathy Exploiter
signatures.description: Consistently manufactures emotional distress scenarios to bypass rational evaluation. Uses relationship trust as a vector for financial extraction.
detection_markers: payment method inconsistent with claimed context

signatures.label: Complexity Concealer
signatures.description: Consistently uses technical or procedural complexity to prevent verification. Overloads recipient with information to suppress critical questioning.

signatures.label: Confirmation Mirror
signatures.description: Consistently mirrors recipient desires and beliefs to manufacture trust. Tells the recipient what they want to hear before requesting action.

signatures.label: Assumption Anchor
signatures.description: Inward-facing: User consistently fails to question foundational assumptions. Reasoning proceeds from unexamined premises.

signatures.label: Stakeholder Blind
signatures.description: Inward-facing: User consistently fails to account for others' interests and incentives in their reasoning.

signatures.label: Risk Minimiser
signatures.description: Inward-facing: User consistently underweights downside risk in their reasoning. Optimism bias shapes conclusions.
